# Render Notation With Verovio

## Lesson Goal

Export MusicXML and render SVG notation.

## What to Notice

This is the publication layer: code output becomes something a musician can inspect.

## Work With the Notebook

- [Open the notebook source](https://github.com/buildLittleWorlds/marimo-audio-self-tutorial/blob/main/notebooks/14_verovio_svg/notebook.py)
- Browser notebook: local-first for this lesson because it uses upload, notation, audio, or model dependencies that are not reliable in WASM.

Run locally:

```bash
uv run marimo edit notebooks/14_verovio_svg/notebook.py
```

## Feedback Lens

Check whether the student uses `mo.Html` for SVG rather than printing markup as text.

## Instructor Notes

Use this lesson as a small checkpoint. Before asking students to add features,
ask them to name the input, the transformation, the output, and the current
limitation. That habit will matter more in later transcription notebooks than
any one line of code.
